home.title: Hilads — Connect with locals & explorers through challenges
home.description: You're a local or an explorer. Launch a challenge — food, place, culture, help — and meet people who accept. Real-time, no sign-up.
home.subhead: 🔥 Where locals and explorers connect through challenges.
home.intro: Hilads connects locals and explorers in every city through challenges. Drop one for the other side — pick a type, give it a title, watch people accept. Once it's done, the creator validates. Real-time, no sign-up.
home.aboutBody: Pick your city. Launch a challenge for the other side, or accept one that speaks to you. Meet locals and travelers through what you actually want to do — food, place, culture, help. Hilads makes every city feel alive, right now.

common.aboutHiladsBody: Hilads is a live social layer over cities worldwide. Open the app, see who's around right now, join an event in one tap, or host your own. No friends list to build first.

event.title: {title} — meet locals and travelers | Hilads
event.titleCity: {title} in {city} — meet locals and travelers | Hilads
event.descPast: {title} in {city}{when}.{attended} See what's happening now and meet locals and travelers on Hilads.
event.descUpcoming: Join {title} in {city}{time} — meet locals and travelers, take on a local challenge, see what's happening nearby. No sign-up on Hilads.

venue.title: {name} — meet locals and travelers | Hilads
venue.titleCity: {name} in {city} — meet locals and travelers | Hilads
venue.desc: {name}{where} — meet locals and travelers, take on a local challenge, see what's happening nearby on Hilads. Real-time, no sign-up.
venue.aboutBar: {name} is a bar in {city}. Hilads shows you who's heading there today and other places nearby with the same energy.
venue.aboutCafe: {name} is a coffee shop in {city}. Hilads is the easy way to find people to grab a coffee with — locals and travelers, no awkward profile-swiping.

challenge.title: {title} — challenge in {city} | Hilads
challenge.descLocals: {title} — challenge for locals of {city}. Accept the challenge, meet travelers, no sign-up.
challenge.descExplorers: {title} — challenge for explorers in {city}. Accept the challenge, meet locals, no sign-up.
challenge.descGeneric: {title} — accept the challenge on Hilads and meet locals or travelers in {city}.
challenge.aboutBody: On Hilads, locals and explorers connect through challenges. Pick a type — food, place, culture, help — give it a title, and watch people accept. Once completed, the creator validates the challenge.

category.title: {label} in {city}
category.descMany: {total} {label} in {city} right now. Plus open challenges to take on — meet locals and travelers, real-time, no sign-up.
category.descSomeUpcoming: {city} {label} on Hilads. {count} upcoming + challenges to take on — meet locals and travelers in one tap.
category.descSomeBrowse: {city} {label} on Hilads. Browse venues, take on local challenges, meet locals and travelers in one tap.
category.descFew: Looking for {label} in {city}? Hilads lists what's on tonight + challenges from locals to take on. Small but real.
category.aboutBody: Hilads is the easy way to find people for {label} in {city}. Open the app, see who's heading out, join in one tap.

city.title: Challenges & events in {city} {timeframe} — meet locals | Hilads
city.descHigh: Take on a local challenge in {city} this week — {count}+ events to join, live city chat with people online now. No signup.
city.descMid: Take on a challenge or join a meetup in {city} tonight — dinners, rooftop hangs, live city chat. No signup.
city.descLow: Take on a local challenge or see who's in {city} right now — live city chat, meetups, real-time activity. No signup.
city.introEmpty: — be the first to bring the city out.
city.noEvents: No events yet — open the app to create the first one.
city.regionGeneric: Live in {country} or just visiting? Hilads brings the people out.
city.aboutBody1: Hilads is a live social layer over {city}. Open the app, see who's around right now, jump into something happening, or host your own event. No friends list to build first, no sign-up to get in.
city.aboutBody2: Whether you live in {city} or you're visiting for a few days, Hilads makes it easy to meet people the way locals do — through what's actually happening, not through profiles.

past.title: Past activity in {city} | Hilads
past.descItems: A look back at recent hangouts, pulses and validated challenges in {city} on Hilads — see what locals and travelers got up to, then find what's on next.
past.introItems: A look back at recent hangouts, pulses and validated challenges in {city}.
past.whatsNextBody: This is what recently happened in {city} on Hilads. See {link} and join in one tap.
